title: Simple Invisible Frames
description: The simpliest(probably) plugin for making Invisible Item Frames(and Glowing Frames too!)
body:
The simpliest(probably) plugin to create invisible item frames.          
Simply click on frame using shears and it will become invisible, and destroy it if you want to make it visible          
No permissions, no statistics, no commands, just click on a frame, and it will disappear. 
Here's an example of it![Demo](https://i.imgur.com/ShciiPd.gif)
